title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Go Semantics Case: Idempotency Key Replay
summary: A list endpoint skips and duplicates rows during concurrent writes, create retries duplicate charges, PATCH silently overwrites fields, and response schemas expose storage columns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo idempotency key replay increment in stable resource and mutation consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Scope and validate idempotency keys, bind request fingerprints, serialize first execution, persist terminal outcome, expire records, and reject mismatched replay.
Build opaque cursor pagination from a unique stable order, bound page size, preserve filters and authorization, and test inserts and deletes between pages.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
